setupGuide.notes: AMS2 ships the Buenos Aires No.15 circuit the 1974 race ran; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.
AMS2 ships the 7.9 km historic Interlagos the 1974 Brazilian GP ran; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.
AMS2 ships the historic Kyalami; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.

Placeholder for Circuito del Jarama - 84 laps / 285.9 km reproduced as 68 laps of Jerez 1988. Jerez keeps the Spanish GP in Spain on a tight, technical parkland circuit of the era character; Jarama has no AMS2 counterpart.
Placeholder for Nivelles-Baulers - 85 laps / 316.5 km reproduced as 46 laps of Spa-Francorchamps 1993. Spa keeps the Belgian GP in Belgium; Nivelles has no AMS2 counterpart.
AMS2 Azure Circuit is Monaco; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.

Placeholder for Scandinavian Raceway, Anderstorp - 80 laps / 321.4 km reproduced as 47 laps of Hockenheim 1977. Old Hockenheim flat, straight-dominated forest blasts match Anderstorp runway-straight character; the German GP runs at the Nurburgring this season, so Hockenheim is free.

Placeholder for Circuit Park Zandvoort - 75 laps / 317.0 km reproduced as 67 laps of Silverstone 1975. Silverstone 1975 flat, fast sweepers match Zandvoort rhythm; the British GP runs at Brands Hatch this season, so Silverstone is free.

Placeholder for Dijon-Prenois - 80 laps / 263.1 km reproduced as 60 laps of Estoril 1988. Estoril short, fast, elevation-swooping layout matches Dijon character; Brands Hatch (the base suggestion) already hosts this season British GP.
AMS2 ships Brands Hatch GP; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.
AMS2 Nordschleife is the Nurburgring; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.
AMS2 Spielberg Vintage is the 1974 pre-chicane Osterreichring; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.
No 1974 Monza layout in AMS2; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept on the era-matching 1971 layout.
AMS2 ships the 1971 Mosport; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.
AMS2 ships the 1971 Watkins Glen GP layout the 1974 race ran; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.
